name: WildWorlds: Zyxaranth's Domain
short_description: A top-down linear action-adventure game that is heavily inspired by the StarTropics games.
detailed_description: Mysteriously brought to strange new worlds, you are summoned to help stop the evil overlord Zyxarnath from taking over the galaxy. Armed with a deck of cards will you be able to stop the evil mastermind and his devious creations? This game takes heavy inspiration from the old StarTropics series or Zelda series where you progress fairly linearly through a series of overworld areas and dungeons. There are a variety of secrets and puzzles to solve to aid you on your quest so make sure to keep your eyes peeled and your brain engaged as you progress through the journey!
